pr.title: Record: MuonEq-R + Depth Recurrence + N61 Mixed GPTQ — val_bpb 1.0924 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines MuonEq-R row-normalized optimizer, shared depth recurrence on layers 4/5, and Hessian-ranked GPTQ mixed int6/int5 quantization to fit an extra int6 layer.
techniques: MuonEq-R optimizer with row normalization before NS5
Depth recurrence repeating layers 4 and 5 with shared MLP weights
Hessian-ranked GPTQ with 61 int6 plus 5 int5 layers
